hero.title: What loads first is a business decision.
hero.lead: biagiojs orders HTML, hydration and preload from weights you declare — conversion, SEO, interaction, cost. Pages without islands ship zero JavaScript.

scores.title: This page, audited
scores.lead: Google Lighthouse on this site — mobile on throttled 4G, desktop emulated. One island; everything else static HTML.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.text: Render priority = business value ÷ CPU cost. High-conversion nodes move up in the HTML source.

islands.title: Islands
islands.text: Hydrate eager, lazy, or never. A 300 KB chat widget at conversion 0.05 stays static.

seo.title: SEO
seo.text: Canonical, Open Graph, JSON-LD, sitemap, hreflang — generated at build time.

images.title: Images
images.text: AVIF/WebP/JPEG via sharp. Profiles, srcset validation, remote sources.

ssg.title: SSG + adapters
ssg.text: Static by default. Node, Vercel, Cloudflare adapters for SSR/ISR when you need them.

demo.title: Feel the scheduler
demo.lead: One island on this page. Drag the sliders — the hydration plan moves live between static, lazy and eager.
demo.goldenText: Static is the default. Every hydrate needs a reason.
demo.goldenHint: Thresholds: eager ≥ 0.3 · lazy ≥ 0.05 · below = no JS.

a.title: Static is the default
a.text: A page ships zero JavaScript until something on it earns hydration. The fast path is the one you don't opt out of.

b.title: Business weights decide
b.text: Conversion, SEO and interaction are inputs to the build, not afterthoughts. The scheduler turns them into source order and a hydration plan.

c.title: Field data closes the loop
c.text: Real CrUX, analytics and heatmap reports recalibrate the weights on every build — the site tunes itself to how people actually use it.

cta.title: Ship the fast path by default
cta.text: Scaffold a project, declare a few weights, and let the build decide what goes on the wire first.

footer.line: built with biagiojs — this site is the output of biagio build docs

docsIndex.title: Documentation
docsIndex.intro: Reference for building sites with biagiojs. Each page is static HTML from the same toolchain.

meta.homeDesc: Ship less JavaScript. biagiojs orders HTML, hydration and preload from business weights — conversion, SEO, interaction. SSG, adaptive islands, built-in SEO.
meta.docsDesc: Guides and reference for biagiojs: getting started, .biagio syntax, business weights, adaptive hydration, automatic SEO, images, deploy and CLI.
